active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 1 translates Letta reference semantics into MemoryOS-specific benchmark-impact contracts, consuming the Phase 0 LongMemEval/LoCoMo case taxonomy without changing code or blueprint.

objective: Produce a Letta gap matrix and testable MemoryOS contract decisions for later phases, prioritizing LoCoMo retrieval/scope gaps and LongMemEval evidence-to-answer gaps separately.
scope: Read work/phase-1/context_bundle.md before any other phase-local artifact.
Compare required Letta files against current MemoryOS v3 contracts and diagnostics.
Write work/phase-1/research.md if using a research lane; research lane must not write outside that file.
Write work/phase-1/letta_gap_matrix.md from execute lane after consuming research.
Map every high-priority gap to future failing tests or Phase 0 benchmark cases.
Keep LongMemEval and LoCoMo impacts separate.
non_goals: Do not modify src/, tests/, alembic/, benchmark data, active docs, state.json, or blueprint.md in Phase 1.
Do not add Letta as a runtime dependency.
Do not optimize retrieval, context composition, answer projection, or kernel behavior.
Do not enable MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL by default.
Do not claim benchmark improvement from Phase 0 smoke.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: Phase 1 is contract-only. If an implementation change appears necessary, stop with GOD_ADJUST instead of editing code.
usable_ack_checklist: letta_gap_matrix.md exists and cites the active goal and context bundle.
Every high-priority gap maps to a future failing test or benchmark case.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo benchmark impacts are separated.
Contract decisions are concrete enough for later RED tests.
No runtime dependency on Letta is introduced.
No src/, tests/, benchmark data, state, or blueprint behavior changes are made.
v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in constraints remain explicit.
review_focus: Reject plan-only observations that do not become testable contracts.
Reject hidden LoCoMo failures or LongMemEval-only prioritization.
Check no Letta runtime dependency or broad port is proposed.
Check source grounding and source_hit are not conflated.
Check phase binding on every artifact.
